title: Support turf work
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Support turf work demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare materials, tools and equipment for turf work

pcs.text: Confirm work activity and identify resources required with supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm work activity and identify resources required with supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm work activity and identify resources required with supervisor.
